emails.subject: Code Gentrics
emails.body: Code Gentrics Lynn, a mtg. for Wednesday, November 28th has been scheduled for 8:30am-9:00am in conf. EB42C2 is this time okay with you. Thanks, Ava

emails.subject: RE: Code Gentrics
emails.body: RE: Code Gentrics Ava, does Tim know I only have 30 minutes? As far as I know Shelley will be having her staff meeting. Otherwise, I am OK. Thanks. Lynn To: Blair, Lynn

emails.subject: RE: Code Gentrics
emails.body: Connie is aware that you are available for 30min, she is scheduling this meeting. Ava To: Garcia, Ava
